name: Principal Residence Reacquisition Rollover

eligibility.description: Applies to reacquisitions of property where gain was excluded under Section 121, provided the property is resold within one year of reacquisition.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: If a principal residence is reacquired and resold within one year, the resale is treated as part of the original sale for purposes of the Section 121 exclusion.
